name: Namaste, Magadan!
overview: An airplane flying from Delhi to San Francisco had an engine failure and had to make an emergency landing at Magadan Airport. Now passengers and crew members are forced to spend an indefinite amount of time in the harsh northern capital of Kolyma. Local residents cordially provide assistance to foreigners in trouble and accommodate guests at the nearest school, among them will be the main character, IT specialist Vasant. He will have to find his love and fight for it in harsh conditions.
